# supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [ApiSpecification Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-apispecification.html): Defines the core RESTful interface, data models, and endpoint contracts using the OpenAPI standard. Architectural overview of the ApiSpecification domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [PortalConfiguration Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-portalconfiguration.html): Manages the metadata, rendering rules, and external presentation of the documentation site. Architectural overview of the PortalConfiguration domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [TechnicalDocumentation Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/domain-technicaldocumentation.html): Handles the narrative technical writing and usage guides for consumers using MDX components. Architectural overview of the TechnicalDocumentation domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [docs.json — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-docs-json.html): Architecture documentation for docs.json, a json file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
- [overrides.css — supermodel-api-docs Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/supermodel-api-docs/file-overrides-css.html): Architecture documentation for overrides.css, a css file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
